briefdescription.para: These constants specify different types of handler and used to differentiate interrupt requests from peripheral.
HD mode.
SD mode.
3G mode
Unknown mode.
6G mode
12G mode
Number of supported modes.
SDI Transport Modes Enumeration of supported SDI transport modes.
SDI Debug Selection IDs Used to select which debug information to display.
SMPTE ST 274 standard.
SMPTE ST 296 standard.
SMPTE ST 2048-2 standard.
SMPTE ST 295 standard.
NTSC format.
PAL format.
SDI Transport Family Encoding Enumeration of supported SDI transport family encodings.
Sdi HD.
Sdi SD.
Sdi 3G.
Sdi 6G.
Sdi 12G Integer Framerate.
Sdi 12G Fractional Framerate.
SDI Supported Modes.
SDI Transport Rate Enumeration of supported SDI transport rates.
Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.

memberdef.name: XV_SDIRX_VID_LCK_WINDOW
memberdef.initializer: 0x3000 /* The period of clock cycles Video lock interrupt must be asserted before interrupt is generated */

briefdescription.para: Generates a bitmask with the nth bit set to 1.
Retrieves the version of the SDI Rx instance.

detaileddescription.para: This macro reads and returns the version register value of the specified SDI Rx instance by accessing the version offset register at the instance's base address.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_SdiRx instance.

simplesect.para: The version register value of the SDI Rx instance.

briefdescription.para: Sdi HD.
Sdi SD.
Sdi 3G.
Sdi 6G.
Sdi 12G Integer Framerate.
Sdi 12G Fractional Framerate.
SDI Search Modes.
Callback type for interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration for a SDI Rx core based on its base address.

detaileddescription.para:
BaseAddress
The base address of the SDI Rx core to search for.
Pointer to the XV_SdiRx_Config structure corresponding to the given BaseAddress. Returns NULL if a matching configuration is not found.
This function searches the configuration table for a device matching the specified BaseAddress and returns a pointer to its configuration structure. The configuration structure contains all hardware-specific parameters needed to initialize the SDI Rx core. Looks up the device configuration for a SDI Rx core based on its base address.
The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xv_sdirx_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the SDI RX core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XV_SdiRx_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xv_sdirx_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.
None. Look up the configuration for an SDI Rx device based on its base address.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the SDI Rx device to look up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the XV_SdiRx_Config structure for the device at the specified base address, or NULL if no matching configuration is found.
This function searches the configuration table for a device matching the provided base address and returns the corresponding configuration. If no match is found, NULL is returned.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the SDI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the SDI RX core. Initialization of the SDI RX includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the SDI RX core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function clears the SDI RX stream variables and sets them to the defaults.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

simplesect.para: This is required after a reset or init.

briefdescription.para: This function returns incoming stream's incoming SDI payload ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies which payload ID is to be returned.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to wait for the payload valid bit to be set.

detaileddescription.para: This has to be called from application based on the callback indication of the video lock interrupt handler. Without this function being called, it may be guaranteed that payload bits are valid after video lock interrupt occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the payload valid bits are not set.
XST_SUCCESS if ST352 registers are read and loaded to Rx structures

briefdescription.para: This function returns the current SDI transport mode detected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the framer function.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the framer automatically readjusts the output word alignment to match the alignment of each timing reference signal (TRS).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the framer function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the type of EDH errors which will trigger the error count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

specifies the type of EDH errors to be allowed to increment the error counter.
Bit 0 = ANC EDH error
Bit 1 = ANC EDA error
Bit 2 = ANC IDH error
Bit 3 = ANC IDA error
Bit 4 = ANC Unknown Error Status error
Bit 5 = FF EDH error
Bit 6 = FF EDA error
Bit 7 = FF IDH error
Bit 8 = FF IDA error
Bit 9 = FF Unknown Error Status error
Bit 10 = AP EDH error
Bit 11 = AP EDA error
Bit 12 = AP IDH error
Bit 13 = AP IDA error
Bit 14 = AP Unknown Error Status error
Bit 15 = EDH packet checksum-error

briefdescription.para: This function enables the modes which the SDI RX core will try to lock on.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies which SDI mode is to be supported from SDI mode detection logic.

simplesect.para: XV_SDIRX_MULTISEARCHMODE must be selected in the XV_SdiRx_Start function.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the modes which the SDI RX core will try to lock on.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies which SDI mode is to be removed from SDI mode detection logic.

briefdescription.para: This function enables SDI RX core's modes detection function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

specifies the mode of SDI modes searching operation.
0 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_HD
1 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_SD
2 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_3G
4 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_6G
5 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_12GI
6 = XV_SDIRX_SINGLESEARCHMODE_12GF
10 = XV_SDIRX_MULTISEARCHMODE where the supported modes will be enabled by XV_SdiRx_EnableMode function

briefdescription.para: This function stops SDI RX core's modes detection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if SDI Rx stop is successful.
XST_FAILURE if SDI Rx stop is unsuccessful

briefdescription.para: This function reports detected CRC or EDH errors count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enables 10bit YUV444 and RGB color format support for SDI Rx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables 10bit YUV444 and RGB color format support for SDI Rx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the clock period for video lock signal to be asserted before video lock interrupt is triggered.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies the clock period.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the video bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the video bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function enable the AXI4S Bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the AXI4S Bridge.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function prints debug information of Stream 0 on STDIO/Uart console.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies which debug information to be printed out

briefdescription.para: Runs a self-test on the driver/device.

detaileddescription.para: This test checks if the LaneCount present in register matches the one from the generated file.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx instance.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the read value was not equal to _g.c file

briefdescription.para: This function will get the interrupt mask set (enabled) in the SDI Rx core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XV_SdiRx instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt enable register

briefdescription.para: This function will get the list of interrupts pending in the Interrupt Status Register of the SDI Rx core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XV_SdiRx instance to operate on

simplesect.para: Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt in Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This function will clear the interrupts set in the Interrupt Status Register of the SDI Rx core.

parameterdescription.para: is the XV_SdiRx instance to operate on
is Interrupt Mask with bits set for corresponding interrupt to be cleared in the Interrupt Status register

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the SDI RX driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt for video lock or video unlock interrupts, determines the source of the interrupts, clears the interrupts and calls callbacks accordingly.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XV_SdiRx_SetCallback() during initialization phase. An example delivered with this driver demonstrates how this could be done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ------------------------- --------------------------------------- (XV_SDIRX_HANDLER_STREAM_DOWN) StreamDownCallback (XV_SDIRX_HANDLER_STREAM_UP) StreamUpCallback (XV_SDIRX_HANDLER_OVERFLOW) OverFlowCallback (XV_SDIRX_HANDLER_UNDERFLOW) UnderFlowCallback (XV_SDIRX_HANDLER_VSYNC) VsyncCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SDI RX core instance.
specifies the type of handler.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the selected interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
is the interrupt mask which need to be disabled in core.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the selected interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
is the interrupt mask which need to be enabled in core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the BitDepth configured for the SDI RXSS into SDI RX core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
specifies which BitDepth to be set

briefdescription.para: This function disables generating Video lock interrupt for no payload case.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_SdiRx core instance.
is to enable/disable the Handling of nopayload case 0 is to disable 1 is to enable

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 jsr 07/17/17 Initial release.
